title: Crispy Italian English Muffin Stir-fry
description: A spicy and crispy weeknight Italian dish featuring nut-free-friendly english muffins in a quick stir-fry recipe.
instructions: Toast muffin halves in the preheated oven for about 2-3 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add ground turkey or chicken and cook until no longer pink, breaking it up with a spoon.
Add onion and garlic to the skillet; sauté for about 1 minute, then add bell peppers and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Pour in soy sauce and mustard, season with red pepper flakes. Stir well until combined.
Place turkey mixture on top of toasted muffin halves and sprinkle with rinsed capers if using.
Bake for about 10-15 minutes or until golden brown and heated through.
Serve hot with a drizzle of extra mustard over the top if desired.
